targets.rawSql:
WITH data AS (
SELECT (TO_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTDAT"::text, 2) || 
    LPAD(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS')) AS time, 
      COALESCE(rc.error_type::text, 'NA') AS error_type, 
      itm."TRTDAT", itm."TRTTIM",
      itm."TRRSPC",
      COUNT(*) AS jumlah,
      COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE rc.error_type = 'Sukses') AS sukses,
      COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE rc.error_type = 'N') AS bisnis
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" itm LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary rc ON  itm."TRRSPC" = rc.rc AND rc.id_app_identifier = 6
      WHERE itm."TRTRTY" = '21' AND itm."TRPCCD" = 59  
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
)     

SELECT 
   (SUM(sukses) + SUM(bisnis)) / SUM(jumlah)
FROM data 
WHERE time BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')

WITH data AS (
SELECT (TO_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING("TRTDAT"::text, 2) || 
    LPAD(SUBSTRING("TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS')) AS time
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" 
      WHERE 
          "TRTRTY" = '21' AND "TRPCCD" = 59
      GROUP BY 1
)     

SELECT date_trunc('minute', time) as time, COUNT(*) FROM data 
WHERE time BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH data AS (

    LPAD(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS')) AS time, COALESCE(rc.error_type::text, 'NA') AS error_type, 
      rc.rc_description, "TRRSPC",
      COUNT(*) AS jumlah,
      COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE rc.error_type = 'Sukses') AS sukses
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" itm LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary rc ON  itm."TRRSPC" = rc.rc AND rc.id_app_identifier = 6
      WHERE 
        itm."TRTRTY" = '21' AND itm."TRPCCD" = 59 
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
)     

SELECT 
    SUM(sukses) / SUM(jumlah) AS persentase
FROM data 
WHERE time BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')

WITH data AS (
SELECT (TO_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTDAT"::text, 2) || 
    LPAD(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS')) AS time, COALESCE(rc.error_type::text, 'NA') AS error_type, 
      rc.rc_description, "TRRSPC",
      COUNT(*) AS jumlah,
      COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rc.error_type = 'S' OR rc.error_type IS NULL) AS "Sistem"
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" itm LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary rc ON  itm."TRRSPC" = rc.rc AND rc.id_app_identifier = 6 
      WHERE 
        itm."TRTRTY" = '21' AND itm."TRPCCD" = 59
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
)     

SELECT 
    (SUM("Sistem")/SUM(jumlah)) AS persentase
FROM data 
WHERE time BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')

WITH data AS (
SELECT (TO_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTDAT"::text, 2) || 
    LPAD(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS')) AS time, COALESCE(rc.error_type::text, 'NA') AS error_type, 
      rc.rc_description, "TRRSPC",
      COUNT(*) AS jumlah
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" itm JOIN response_code_dictionary rc ON  itm."TRRSPC" = rc.rc AND rc.id_app_identifier = 6
      WHERE itm."TRTRTY" = '21' AND itm."TRPCCD" = 59 
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
)     

SELECT 
    date_trunc('minute', time) AS minute_bucket,
    SUM(jumlah) AS jumlah_transaksi,
    (
        SUM(CASE 
            WHEN error_type IN ('Sukses', 'N')
            THEN jumlah 
            ELSE 0 
        END)::numeric
        /
        NULLIF(SUM(jumlah), 0)
    ) * 100 AS "Persentase Sukses"
FROM data
WHERE time BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

-- SELECT * FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" WHERE "TRXMDT" = 1260420 AND "TRTRTY" = '21' AND "TRPCCD" = 59 LIMIT 20

      COUNT(*) AS jumlah
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" itm JOIN response_code_dictionary rc ON  itm."TRRSPC" = rc.rc AND rc.id_app_identifier = 6
      WHERE 
        itm."TRTRTY" = '21' AND itm."TRPCCD" = 59 AND rc.error_type = 'S'
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
)     

SELECT rc, SUM(jumlah) AS sum FROM data 
WHERE time BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY rc ORDER BY sum DESC LIMIT 10

WITH data AS (

      'YYMMDDHH24MISS')) AS time,
      COALESCE(rc.error_type::text, 'NA') AS error_type,
      rc.rc_description, rc.rc,
      COUNT(*) AS jumlah
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" itm JOIN response_code_dictionary rc ON  itm."TRRSPC" = rc.rc AND rc.id_app_identifier = 6
      WHERE 
        itm."TRTRTY" = '21' AND itm."TRPCCD" = 59 AND rc.error_type = 'S'
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
)     

SELECT rc, rc_description, SUM(jumlah) AS Jumlah FROM data 
WHERE time BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') GROUP BY rc, 2 ORDER BY Jumlah DESC LIMIT 10

-- SELECT * FROM response_code_dictionary WHERE id_app_identifier = 6

-- TRDOC2

WITH data AS (
SELECT (TO_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTDAT"::text, 2) || 
    LPAD(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS')) AS time,
      COALESCE(rc.error_type::text, 'NA') AS error_type,
      rc.rc_description, rc.rc,
      COUNT(*) AS jumlah
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" itm JOIN response_code_dictionary rc ON  itm."TRRSPC" = rc.rc AND rc.id_app_identifier = 6
      WHERE 
        itm."TRTRTY" = '21' AND itm."TRPCCD" = 59 AND rc.error_type = 'N'
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
)     

SELECT rc, rc_description, SUM(jumlah) AS Jumlah FROM data 
WHERE time BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') GROUP BY rc, 2 ORDER BY Jumlah DESC LIMIT 10 

-- SELECT * FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" WHERE "TRXMDT" = 1260420 AND "TRTRTY" = '21' AND "TRPCCD" = 59 LIMIT 20

-- SELECT * FROM response_code_dictionary WHERE id_app_identifier = 6

-- TRDOC2

WITH data AS (
    SELECT 
        (TO_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTDAT"::text, 2) || 
        LPAD(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS')) AS time_col,
        COALESCE(rc.error_type::text, 'NA') AS error_type,
        rc.rc_description, 
        rc.rc,
        CASE WHEN "TRCATA" LIKE 'Grab%' THEN 'Grab'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'Traveloka%' THEN 'Traveloka' 
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'DANA QR%'THEN 'DANA QR'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'DAN+DAN%'THEN 'DAN+DAN'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'Spotify%' THEN 'Spotify'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'Canva%' THEN 'Canva'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE '%ELZATTA%' THEN 'ELZATTA'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'TTS by TKPD%' THEN 'TTS by TKPD'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'AZKO%' THEN 'AZKO'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE '%MR DIY%' OR "TRCATA" ILIKE '%MR.D.I.Y%' THEN 'MR DIY'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'Upwork%'THEN 'Upwork'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'AGODA%'THEN 'AGODA.COM'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'FACEBK%' THEN 'FACEBK'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'NETFLIX%' THEN 'NETFLIX'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'GOOGLECLOUD%' THEN 'GOOGLECLOUD'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'GoPayQR%' THEN 'GoPayQR'
        WHEN "TRCATA" ILIKE 'DANA TOP UP%' THEN 'DANA TOP UP'
        
        ELSE "TRCATA" END AS "Merchant",
        COUNT(*) AS jumlah,
        COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE error_type = 'Sukses') AS sukses,
        COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE error_type = 'N') AS bisnis,
        COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE error_type = 'S') AS sistem
    FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" itm 
    JOIN response_code_dictionary rc ON itm."TRRSPC" = rc.rc 
        AND rc.id_app_identifier = 6
    WHERE 
        itm."TRTRTY" = '21' 
        AND itm."TRPCCD" = 59 
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
)    

SELECT
    "Merchant",  
    SUM(jumlah) AS total_transaksi,
    SUM(sukses) AS total_sukses,
    SUM(bisnis) AS total_bisnis_error,
    SUM(sistem) AS total_sistem_error,
    SUM(sukses)/SUM(jumlah) * 100 AS persentase_sukses,
    (SUM(sukses) + SUM(bisnis))/SUM(jumlah) * 100 AS success_rate
FROM data 
WHERE time_col BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY "Merchant"
ORDER BY total_transaksi DESC;

WITH data AS (
SELECT TO_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTDAT"::text, 2) || 
  LPAD(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS') AS time,
      COALESCE(rc.error_type::text, 'NA') AS error_type,
      itm."TRDOC2",
      rc.rc_description, rc.rc,
      COUNT(*) AS jumlah
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" itm JOIN response_code_dictionary rc ON  itm."TRRSPC" = rc.rc AND rc.id_app_identifier = 6
      WHERE 
        itm."TRTRTY" = '21' AND itm."TRPCCD" = 59 AND rc.error_type = 'N'
        AND "TRDOC2" IN ('R3CYE', 'RE2YE', 'RECYE')
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
)     

SELECT "TRDOC2", SUM(jumlah) AS jumlah FROM data 
WHERE time BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY jumlah DESC LIMIT 10
